title: OpenSynaptic L5 Full Ecosystem
description: Aggregate ecosystem certification profile for exhaustive business logic, plugin systems, security infrastructure, and orthogonal design coverage.

execution.note: L5 represents ecosystem-level equivalence and is appropriate only for implementations that expose the required server-like surfaces.

passCriteria.note: L5 accepts only known-design-limit skips and requires ecosystem-wide pass rate of at least 99.5 percent.

skipPolicy.note: Skips are allowed only for documented known limits such as Base62 numeric ceilings already tracked by the certification policy.
